name: Ben
intro: Hi, I'm Ben! My goal is to understand intelligence, cognition and the mind. My core passion lies at the intersection of neuroscience, mathematics, and algorithms. I'm deeply curious about unraveling the mathematical principles that govern how our minds work—translating them into tangible code to simulate aspects of human cognition. My background spans medicine, neurobiology, and cognitive science, complemented by a keen interest in mathematics and psychology.
introHtml: Hi, I'm Ben! My goal is to understand intelligence, cognition and the mind. My core passion lies at the intersection of neuroscience, mathematics, and algorithms—translating principles of cognition into code.
